description: Customize your website's appearance with colors, fonts, and layout options. All changes are applied site-wide.

fields.name: primary_color
fields.label: Primary Color
fields.help: Main brand color used for buttons, links, and accents

fields.name: secondary_color
fields.label: Secondary Color
fields.help: Secondary color for gradients and highlights

fields.name: text_color
fields.label: Text Color
fields.help: Default text color for body content

fields.name: background_color
fields.label: Background Color
fields.help: Main background color for your site

fields.name: font_family
fields.label: Font Family
fields.help: Choose the font for your website

fields.name: border_radius
fields.label: Border Radius (px)
fields.help: Roundness of corners for buttons and cards (0 = square)

fields.name: enable_shadows
fields.label: Box Shadows
fields.checkbox_label: Enable shadow effects on cards and buttons
fields.help: Adds depth with subtle shadow effects

fields.name: enable_animations
fields.label: Animations
fields.help: Adds smooth hover effects and transitions

fields.name: custom_css
fields.label: Custom CSS
fields.placeholder:
/* Add your custom CSS here */
.my-class { color: red; }
fields.help: Add any custom CSS code to further customize your theme

fields.name: google_fonts_url
fields.label: Google Fonts URL (Optional)
fields.help: Load custom fonts from Google Fonts
